user_story: As an admin, I want to sign in via the agent endpoint so that automated tests reach admin pages without a password flow
preconditions: Dev environment running; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Navigate to /api/auth/agent?role=admin&redirect=/platform/users
2. Follow redirect chain
expected_result: HTTP 302 to /platform/users; HttpOnly session cookie set; /platform/users renders the user list
notes: Endpoint must be dev-only — T-004 verifies production 404

user_story: As a member, I want to sign in via the agent endpoint so that automated tests access member pages instantly
preconditions: Dev environment running; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Navigate to /api/auth/agent?role=member&redirect=/
2. Follow redirect
expected_result: Session cookie set; home dashboard renders with alice@seed.local product cards

user_story: As a viewer, I want to sign in via the agent endpoint so that viewer-role tests run without credential flow
preconditions: Dev environment running; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Navigate to /api/auth/agent?role=viewer&redirect=/
2. Follow redirect
expected_result: Session cookie set; home dashboard loads without error

user_story: As a security engineer, I want the agent endpoint to return 404 in production so that credential bypass is never exposed in prod
preconditions: Production environment (NODE_ENV=production)
steps: 1. GET /api/auth/agent?role=admin
expected_result: HTTP 404; no session cookie created
notes: Security dispatch: dev-only bypass must never ship to prod

user_story: As a tester, I want the agent endpoint to reject unknown roles so that test setup fails fast on misconfiguration
preconditions: Dev environment running
steps: 1. GET /api/auth/agent?role=superuser
expected_result: HTTP 400 or redirect to /sign-in; no authenticated session created

user_story: As a member, I want the agent endpoint to honour the redirect param so that deep-link tests land on the correct page
preconditions: Dev environment running; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Navigate to /api/auth/agent?role=member&redirect=/account/products/nordpass
2. Follow redirect
expected_result: Session set for alice@seed.local; browser is at /account/products/nordpass

user_story: As a member, I want to sign in with a valid email and password so that I can access the portal
preconditions: Sign-out state; alice@seed.local exists
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Enter email: alice@seed.local and password: Passw0rd!
3. Click Continue
expected_result: Redirect to /; home dashboard visible; user name or email displayed in sidebar footer

user_story: As a user, I want to see an inline error when my password is wrong so that I understand why sign-in failed
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Enter email: alice@seed.local and password: wrongpassword
3. Click Continue
expected_result: UAlert error message appears inline; no redirect; sign-in form remains visible

user_story: As a user, I want to see an error when my email is not registered
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Enter email: notregistered@example.com and password: Passw0rd!
3. Click Continue
expected_result: Inline error shown; no redirect to /

user_story: As a user, I want email field validation on the sign-in form so that I am guided on format errors before submission
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Submit with email field empty and password: Passw0rd!
expected_result: Validation error 'Enter a valid email' appears below email field; no network request fired

user_story: As a user, I want password required validation on the sign-in form
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Enter email: alice@seed.local; leave password empty
3. Click Continue
expected_result: Validation error 'Password is required' below password field; no network request fired

user_story: As a user, I want email format validation on the sign-in form
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in
2. Enter email: notanemail and password: Passw0rd!
3. Click Continue
expected_result: Validation error 'Enter a valid email' shown; form not submitted

user_story: As a new user, I want to register with name, email, and password so that I can create an account
preconditions: Sign-out state; unique email available
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Fill name: Test User; email: newuser123@example.com; password: Secure123
3. Click Sign up
expected_result: Sent state shown: heading 'Check your email' visible; email address shown in confirmation text

user_story: As a new user, I want to see an error if I register with an already-registered email
preconditions: alice@seed.local already registered
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Fill name: Alice; email: alice@seed.local; password: Passw0rd!
3. Click Sign up
expected_result: Inline error shown indicating the email is already taken; form not submitted

user_story: As a new user, I want name required validation on the sign-up form
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Leave name empty; fill email and password
3. Click Sign up
expected_result: Validation error 'Name is required' below Name field; no submission

user_story: As a new user, I want password length validation on sign-up so that weak passwords are rejected
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Fill name: Test; email: test@example.com; password: short
3. Click Sign up
expected_result: Validation error 'At least 8 characters' below password field; form not submitted

user_story: As a new user, I want email format validation on the sign-up form
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-up
2. Fill name: Test; email: bademail; password: Secure123
3. Click Sign up
expected_result: Validation error 'Enter a valid email' shown

user_story: As a new user who did not receive the verification email, I want a resend option so that I am not locked out
preconditions: sign-up form submitted; sent state displayed
steps: 1. Click Resend email button
expected_result: Success message 'Verification email re-sent.' appears; no error

user_story: As a signed-in user, I want to sign out so that my session ends and I am redirected
preconditions: Signed in as alice@seed.local
steps:
1. Click user menu in sidebar footer
2. Click Sign out
expected_result: Redirect to /sign-in; session cookie cleared; navigating to / again redirects to /sign-in

user_story: As an anonymous user, I want accessing / to redirect me to sign-in
preconditions: Not authenticated
steps: 1. Navigate to /
expected_result: Redirect to /sign-in

user_story: As a user whose session just expired, I want a session-expired banner on the sign-in page
preconditions: Not authenticated
steps: 1. Navigate to /sign-in?reason=session_expired
expected_result: UAlert with title 'Your session expired' and warning color is visible above the form

user_story: As a user, I want Google and GitHub social sign-in buttons on the sign-in page
preconditions: Sign-out state
steps: 1. Navigate to /sign-in
expected_result: Buttons 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with GitHub' are visible below the email/password form

user_story: As a user mid-OIDC-flow, I want sign-in to resume the OAuth authorize flow after authentication so that the RP completes the flow
preconditions: Not authenticated; client_id present in query string
steps:
1. Navigate to /sign-in?client_id=NORDVPN_CLIENT&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fcb&response_type=code&scope=openid
2. Sign in with alice@seed.local credentials
expected_result: After sign-in redirect goes to /api/auth/oauth2/authorize?... (OIDC resume) and not to /

user_story: As an admin, I want to impersonate a user so that I can debug their account experience
preconditions: Signed in as admin@thecodeorigin.com; impersonation available on user detail page
steps:
1. Navigate to /platform/users
2. Click view on alice row
3. Click Impersonate
expected_result: Impersonation banner visible at top of layout; document title starts with [Impersonating]; banner shows alice@seed.local email

user_story: As an admin, I want to stop impersonating so that I return to my own admin session
preconditions: Signed in and impersonating alice@seed.local
steps: 1. Click Stop in impersonation banner
expected_result: Banner disappears; session restored to admin@thecodeorigin.com; title prefix removed; sidebar shows admin nav items

user_story: As a member, I want to update my profile name and see the change reflected immediately
preconditions: Signed in as alice via agent endpoint
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/profile
2. Change name to Alice Updated
3. Click Save changes
expected_result: Toast 'Profile updated'; name in form reflects new value; sidebar user display updated

user_story: As a member, I want the email and account ID fields on the profile page to be read-only
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/profile
expected_result: Email field is disabled; Account ID field is disabled; no editing possible for these fields

user_story: As a member, I want to change my password from the Security page with cross-field validation
preconditions: Signed in as alice via agent
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/security
2. Enter current: Passw0rd!; new: NewSecure1; confirm: DifferentPass
3. Click Update password
expected_result: Validation error 'Passwords do not match' on confirm field; password not changed

user_story: As a member, I want to successfully change my password when current password and confirm match
preconditions: Signed in as alice via agent
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/security
2. Enter current: Passw0rd!; new: NewPass123; confirm: NewPass123
3. Click Update password
expected_result: Toast 'Password changed'; other sessions revoked; form cleared

user_story: As a member, I want to revoke other active sessions from the Security page
preconditions: Signed in as alice; another session exists
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/security
2. Wait for sessions table to load
3. Click Revoke all others
expected_result: Other sessions removed from list; toast 'Other sessions revoked'; current session remains marked as 'Current'

user_story: As a registered OIDC client, I want a single user sign-in to authenticate all clients without re-prompting for credentials
preconditions: IdP running; .clients.json populated via seed:idp; alice credentials valid
steps:
1. POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with alice credentials — store session cookie
2. For each client in .clients.json run authorize + token exchange
expected_result: All clients receive authorization code and exchange for token successfully; none cause a redirect to /sign-in; pass count = total client count
notes: Mirrors sso-proof.mjs — the defining SSO acceptance criterion

user_story: As an OIDC relying party, I want id_tokens with standard claims and RS256 algorithm
preconditions: Alice signed in; id_token obtained for any client
steps:
1. Decode id_token JWT header
2. Decode id_token JWT payload
expected_result: alg=RS256 in header; sub claim present; iss matches IdP origin; aud matches requesting client_id

user_story: As a confidential OIDC client, I want to authenticate at the token endpoint using HTTP Basic auth
preconditions: Authorization code obtained for a confidential client
steps: 1. POST /api/auth/oauth2/token with Authorization: Basic base64(clientId:secret) header
expected_result: HTTP 200; access_token and id_token in response body

user_story: As a public OIDC client, I want to authenticate at the token endpoint using client_id in the request body
preconditions: Authorization code and code_verifier available for public client
steps: 1. POST /api/auth/oauth2/token with client_id in body; code_verifier present; no Authorization header
expected_result: HTTP 200; access_token and id_token returned

user_story: As a security engineer, I want public clients that omit code_verifier to be rejected
preconditions: Authorization code obtained for public client; intentionally omitting code_verifier
steps: 1. POST /api/auth/oauth2/token for public client with no code_verifier
expected_result: HTTP 400; token not issued; error response in body
notes: Security: PKCE enforcement is mandatory for public clients

user_story: As a public OIDC client, I want PKCE with the correct code_verifier to succeed
preconditions: PKCE verifier and S256 challenge computed before authorize
steps:
1. Authorize with code_challenge=S256(verifier)
2. Exchange code with matching code_verifier
expected_result: HTTP 200; id_token issued

user_story: As a security engineer, I want authorization codes to be single-use
preconditions: Authorization code obtained
steps:
1. Exchange code once — succeeds
2. Exchange the same code again
expected_result: Second exchange returns HTTP 400 or 401; code reuse rejected; no duplicate token issued
notes: Security: prevent authorization code replay

user_story: As an OIDC relying party, I want already-authenticated sessions to be accepted without re-prompting
preconditions: Alice signed in; session cookie present
steps:
1. Authorize for client A — receive code
2. Immediately authorize for client B with same session cookie
expected_result: Client B receives authorization code without any redirect to /sign-in
notes: Core SSO invariant — second authorize must not prompt for credentials

user_story: As an Express RP, I want to complete the OIDC authorization code flow end-to-end
preconditions: examples/express/ RP configured; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Start Express RP
2. Navigate to RP home; click login
3. Sign in at IdP; callback completes
expected_result: Express RP renders alice profile from id_token claims; session established at RP

user_story: As a Vue SPA (public client), I want to complete a PKCE-based OIDC flow without a client secret
preconditions: examples/vue/ SPA configured as public client in .clients.json
steps:
1. Open Vue SPA
2. Click login (SPA generates PKCE verifier+challenge)
3. Sign in at IdP
4. Callback with code; SPA exchanges with code_verifier
expected_result: Vue SPA renders alice profile; no client_secret used in any request

user_story: As a NordVPN OIDC client, I want id_token.org to be the org where alice has a tier-0 NordVPN access grant (Org B)
preconditions: seed:authz-fixtures applied; alice in Org B with viewer grant scoped to NordVPN client
steps:
1. Obtain id_token for NordVPN client
2. Decode id_token payload
expected_result: org claim = Org B id; tier-0 exact grant wins over personal wildcard grant
notes: Mirrors authz-proof.mjs AC3

user_story: As a NordVPN OIDC client, I want id_token.roles to reflect alice's viewer role in Org B
preconditions: seed:authz-fixtures applied
steps:
1. Obtain id_token for NordVPN client
2. Inspect roles claim
expected_result: roles = 'viewer'

user_story: As a Nord Web OIDC client, I want id_token.org to be alice's personal org because Org B has no Nord Web grant (default-closed)
preconditions: seed:authz-fixtures applied; Org B has no Nord Web access row
steps:
1. Obtain id_token for Nord Web client
2. Inspect org claim
expected_result: org = personal org id; org is NOT Org B id; default-closed deny works
notes: Mirrors authz-proof.mjs AC4

user_story: As a Nord Web OIDC client, I want id_token.personal = true when the resolved org is alice's personal org
preconditions: seed:authz-fixtures applied
steps: 1. Obtain id_token for Nord Web client
expected_result: personal claim = true in decoded id_token payload

user_story: As a security engineer, I want default-closed to mean no org or roles claims in id_token when no access grant exists for that client
preconditions: No access grant exists between alice and the test client
steps:
1. Register a new client with no access grants
2. Obtain id_token for that client
expected_result: id_token payload lacks org and roles claims; no org context leaked
notes: Security: default-closed deny — no implicit disclosure

user_story: As an OIDC client, I want the personal org wildcard grant to serve as a fallback when no exact-match grant exists
preconditions: alice personal org has '*' wildcard grant
steps: 1. Obtain id_token for a client that only matches the wildcard grant
expected_result: org = personal org id; personal = true

user_story: As a dynamic-role user (bob), I want my custom project-viewer role to appear in id_token claims
preconditions: bob@seed.local has role project-viewer in an org; seed:idp applied
steps:
1. Sign in as bob
2. Obtain id_token for a client with access to that org
expected_result: roles claim includes 'project-viewer'

user_story: As a NordPass OIDC client, I want userinfo.entitlement.product = 'nordpass' for alice
preconditions: seed:subscriptions applied; alice has active NordPass sub; NordPass client registered
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for NordPass client
2. GET /api/auth/oauth2/userinfo with Bearer token
expected_result: Response body contains entitlement.product = 'nordpass'
notes: Mirrors entitlement-proof.mjs

user_story: As a NordPass OIDC client, I want userinfo.entitlement.active = true for alice's active NordPass subscription
preconditions: alice has active nordpass-premium or nordpass-family sub
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for NordPass client
2. GET userinfo
expected_result: entitlement.active = true

user_story: As a NordVPN OIDC client, I want userinfo.entitlement.active = false when alice's NordVPN subscription is expired
preconditions: alice has expired nordvpn-complete sub (seeded Dec 14 2023)
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for NordVPN client
2. GET userinfo
expected_result: entitlement.product = 'nordvpn'; entitlement.active = false

user_story: As a relying party, I want entitlement returned with active=false for an expired subscription rather than the field being absent
preconditions: Expired sub exists for the requesting client's product
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for the matching client
2. GET userinfo
expected_result: entitlement object present with active=false; not null/absent from response

user_story: As a relying party, I want entitlement to be absent when the user has no subscription for my product
preconditions: alice has no active or expired subscription that maps to the requesting client
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for a client whose product alice has never subscribed to
2. GET userinfo
expected_result: entitlement key absent or null in userinfo response

user_story: As a NordLocker client, I want userinfo.entitlement to reflect the free-tier active status
preconditions: alice has active nordlocker-free sub
steps:
1. Obtain access_token for NordLocker client
2. GET userinfo
expected_result: entitlement.product = 'nordlocker'; entitlement.active = true

user_story: As a relying party, I want entitlement accessible only via userinfo and not baked into the id_token payload
preconditions: Access token obtained for any client
steps:
1. Obtain id_token
2. Decode id_token payload
expected_result: id_token payload does NOT contain an entitlement key
notes: Keep id_tokens slim; entitlement is userinfo-only

user_story: As a member, I want to see product cards for my subscriptions on the home dashboard
preconditions: Signed in as alice@seed.local via agent; seed:subscriptions applied
steps:
1. Navigate to /
2. Wait for async data to load
expected_result: SubscriptionProductCard components visible for each of alice's seeded subscriptions (nordvpn-complete, dark-web-monitor, nordpass-premium, nordpass-family, nordlocker-free)

user_story: As a member with an expired subscription, I want an expiry banner on the home dashboard
preconditions: alice has expired nordvpn-complete sub; signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /
expected_result: SubscriptionExpiryBanner card visible; NordVPN icon shown; text contains 'subscription has expired'

user_story: As a member, I want the expiry banner Renew button to navigate to the correct product page
preconditions: Expiry banner visible on /
steps: 1. Click Renew button in expiry banner
expected_result: Browser navigates to /account/products/nordvpn

user_story: As a member with no subscriptions, I want an empty state with a Browse plans link
preconditions: Signed in as a user with zero subscriptions
steps: 1. Navigate to /
expected_result: Text 'You don't have any products yet.' visible; 'Browse plans' link href = /account/plans

user_story: As a member, I want the Account settings card to link to /account/profile
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps:
1. Navigate to /
2. Click Manage account link in sidebar card
expected_result: Navigates to /account/profile

user_story: As a member, I want the Available plans card to link to /account/plans
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps:
1. Navigate to /
2. Click View plans link in sidebar card
expected_result: Navigates to /account/plans

user_story: As any user, I want the home page navbar title to read Home
preconditions: Signed in
steps: 1. Navigate to /
expected_result: DashboardNavbar shows title 'Home'

user_story: As an admin with seeded subscriptions, I want the home page to show subscription cards just like a member
preconditions: Signed in as admin@thecodeorigin.com via agent; seed:subscriptions applied for admin email
steps: 1. Navigate to /
expected_result: Product cards rendered for admin's seeded subscriptions; expiry banner shown for expired subs
notes: seed:subscriptions seeds both alice and admin@thecodeorigin.com

user_story: As a member, I want the Go-to-product card to appear for NordVPN because it has an appUrl
preconditions: Signed in as alice via agent
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordvpn
expected_result: UCard with 'Go to product' button visible; button href = https://nordvpn.com; target=_blank

user_story: As a member, I want the Go-to-product card to be absent for Dark Web Monitor because its appUrl is null
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/dark-web-monitor
expected_result: No 'Go to product' card or button rendered on page
notes: dark-web-monitor has appUrl=null in catalog

user_story: As a member with an expired NordVPN subscription, I want the plan card to show No active plan and a Buy now button
preconditions: alice nordvpn-complete sub is expired; signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordvpn
expected_result: Plan card text = 'No active plan'; 'Buy now' button visible; no 'Manage plan' button

user_story: As a member with an active paid NordPass plan, I want the plan card to show the plan name and a Manage plan button
preconditions: alice has active nordpass-premium or nordpass-family; signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
expected_result: Plan card shows 'active' label and the plan name; 'Manage plan' button visible; no 'Buy now' or 'Upgrade' button

user_story: As a member on the NordLocker free tier, I want the plan card to show Free plan active and an Upgrade button
preconditions: alice has active nordlocker-free sub; no paid nordlocker sub; signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordlocker
expected_result: Plan card text = 'Free plan active'; 'Upgrade' button visible (not 'Buy now'); no 'Manage plan'

user_story: As a member, I want the Members card to appear when I have any subscription (free or paid)
preconditions: alice has active nordlocker-free sub
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordlocker
expected_result: SubscriptionMembersCard rendered on page

user_story: As a member with no subscription for a product, I want the Members card to be absent
preconditions: User with no nordvpn subscription visits nordvpn product page
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordvpn as admin (admin has expired sub → tier=none)
expected_result: Members card NOT rendered; tier resolves to 'none'
notes: expired sub means isActive=false; paidSub=null; freeSub=null; tier='none'

user_story: As a member on a multi-seat paid plan, I want the Add seat button to appear in the Members card
preconditions: alice has active nordpass-family (6 seats, paid); signed in as alice
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
2. Observe Members card header
expected_result: Add seat button (i-lucide-plus icon + label) is visible in Members card header; canAddSeat=true

user_story: As a member on a single-seat paid plan, I want the Add seat button to be absent
preconditions: User has an individual paid plan with seats=1
steps: 1. Navigate to product page for that individual plan
expected_result: Members card visible; no Add seat button; seatCapable=false

user_story: As a member on the free tier with a paid upgrade available, I want an upgrade hint in the Members card
preconditions: alice has nordlocker-free; nordlocker-premium exists in catalog
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordlocker
expected_result: Members card shows text 'Upgrade to a paid plan to add members'; no Add seat button

user_story: As a user, I want navigating to an unknown product slug to not throw a JS error
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/does-not-exist
expected_result: Page renders without JS console error; product computed = undefined; body area is empty or shows fallback

user_story: As a member, I want the Plans page to show all 6 catalog plans with names, prices, and features
preconditions: Signed in as alice
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/plans
expected_result: 6 UCard elements; each shows plan name, formatted price, billing interval label, feature list, and View product button

user_story: As a member, I want the Buy now button to be disabled with a warning when Polar is not configured
preconditions: polarConfigured=false returned by /api/billing/config
steps: 1. Navigate to any product page that has a paidPlan but Polar not configured
expected_result: Buy now or Upgrade button is disabled; warning text 'Purchasing is unavailable in this environment.' visible

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want to always see myself as the owner row in the Members card
preconditions: alice is subscription owner; signed in as alice
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
2. Wait for Members card to load
expected_result: Owner row shows alice@seed.local email; status label 'Plan owner' visible

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want the Members card header to display the current count and total seats
preconditions: alice has nordpass-family (6 seats) with 6/6 members
steps: 1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
expected_result: Header reads 'Members (6/6)'

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want to search members by email substring
preconditions: NordPass Family has members including quangtudng@gmail.com
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
2. Type 'quang' in search input
expected_result: Only members whose email contains 'quang' are shown; other members hidden

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want search to be case-insensitive
preconditions: Member email: Hao100319@gmail.com
steps: 1. Type 'HAO' in search input
expected_result: Row with hao100319@gmail.com appears in results

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want 'No members found' shown when search yields no results
preconditions: alice on nordpass family
steps: 1. Type 'zzznomatch' in search input
expected_result: Text 'No members found.' appears; member rows hidden; pagination hidden

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want pagination to appear when there are more than 8 members
preconditions: Subscription has 9 or more family members seeded
steps: 1. Navigate to product page
expected_result: UPagination component visible in card footer; exactly 8 rows on page 1

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want the page to reset to 1 when I change the search query
preconditions: On page 2 of members list
steps: 1. Change search query
expected_result: Pagination resets to page 1; filtered set shown from beginning

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want to add a new family seat
preconditions: alice owns nordpass-family; a free seat available; no subscription at full capacity
steps:
1. Navigate to /account/products/nordpass
2. Click Add seat
3. Enter email: newseat@example.com in modal
4. Click Add seat in modal
expected_result: Modal closes; toast 'Member added'; newseat@example.com row appears in list; member count incremented

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want the Add seat confirm button to be disabled when email is empty
preconditions: Add seat modal open
steps:
1. Open Add seat modal
2. Clear email field
3. Observe Add seat button
expected_result: Add seat button is disabled; cannot submit

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want a prorated charge toast when adding beyond included seats
preconditions: Polar-backed subscription at seat capacity; Polar billing configured
steps: 1. Click Add seat; enter new email; submit
expected_result: Toast 'Seat added — your card was charged a prorated amount'; member appears in list
notes: Requires live Polar integration

user_story: As a subscription owner, I want a clear error toast when adding a duplicate email
preconditions: member@example.com already in the subscription
steps:
1. Open Add seat modal
2. Enter already-present email
3. Submit
expected_result: Error toast 'This person is already a member'; list unchanged; count unchanged
